templates.elastic-overview:
Security Overview

Metric profiles: rate_percentage, mixed

templates.training-plan-tracker:
Training Plan Tracker
Training plan execution view. Top KPI cards (Goals, Activities, Employees, Completions) + status breakdown bar chart + completion donut + full assign-details table with per-employee status tracking. Optimized for training admins managing plan rollouts.
Category: learning_development
Focus areas: training_completion
Audience: learning_admin
Complexity: low
Metric profiles: scorecard, comparison
Destinations: embedded, simple
Chart types: horizontal_bar, donut, kpi_card
Best for: Training plan rollout tracking, Assignment completion monitoring, Plan-level status reporting, Training admin operational view
Source: CCE L&D
templates.team-training-analytics:
Team Training Analytics
Team-level training analytics. KPI quad (Assigned, Completed, Yet to Start, Overdue) + training status bar chart + compliance vs non-compliance trend line + score distribution histogram + compliance training volume bar chart. Manager view for team performance.
Category: learning_development
Focus areas: compliance_posture, training_completion
Audience: learning_admin
Complexity: medium
Metric profiles: trend_heavy, comparison
Destinations: embedded, simple
Chart types: horizontal_bar, line_chart_dual_series, area_histogram, vertical_bar
Best for: Manager training oversight, Team compliance tracking, Score distribution analysis, Training completion trends
Source: CCE L&D
templates.learner-profile:
Learner Profile Dashboard
Individual learner deep-dive. Dark theme. Learner details card (name, org, manager, email, EMP#) + activity status bar chart + KPI cards (Assigned, Completed, Missed Deadline, Training Hours) + activity by type breakdown + YOY launch/completion trends + YOY training hours bar chart. Employee-centric view.
Category: learning_development
Focus areas: compliance_posture, training_completion, learner_engagement
Audience: learning_admin
Complexity: medium
Metric profiles: scorecard, trend_heavy, comparison
Destinations: embedded, simple
Chart types: detail_card, horizontal_bar, kpi_quad, line_chart_dual_series, vertical_bar
Best for: Individual learner analytics, Employee training history, Manager 1:1 prep, Learner performance review, Training compliance per employee
Source: CCE L&D
templates.ld-operations:
L&D Operations Dashboard
Comprehensive L&D operations view. 6-cell KPI strip (Total days, Total hours, Completed trainings, Future registrations, Cost, Cancellations) + 3x3 chart grid: completed/cancelled by org (top 10), hours by age category pie, future registrations by org, top vendors by hours, hours per activity type, hours by month trend, vendors by spend. The densest L&D view — for L&D directors and ops teams.
Category: learning_development
Focus areas: training_completion, vendor_risk
Audience: learning_admin
Complexity: high
Metric profiles: comparison
Destinations: embedded, simple, powerbi
Chart types: horizontal_bar_ranked, pie_chart, vertical_bar_monthly, horizontal_bar_ranked
Best for: L&D operations management, Training cost analysis, Vendor training spend tracking, Organization-level training reporting, L&D director executive view
Source: CCE L&D
templates.learning-measurement:
Learning Measurement Dashboard
Enterprise learning measurement. Three-column layout. Left: Learning Metrics panel (Learners total/repeated, Cost total/avg, Hours total/avg, Attempts total/avg). Center: Assigned Training Compliance donut (Assigned/Completed/In Progress/Overdue). Right: Instructor Led Training KPI grid (Instructors, ILTs Conducted, Avg Capacity, Attendance Rate, ILT Hours, Avg Hours/Class). Bottom row: Learners by Job bar + Top Courses table + Courses Used YOY line.
Category: learning_development
Focus areas: compliance_posture, training_completion, learner_engagement, content_effectiveness
Audience: learning_admin
Complexity: medium
Metric profiles: scorecard, trend_heavy, comparison
Destinations: embedded, simple, powerbi
Chart types: kpi_panel, donut_chart, kpi_grid, horizontal_bar, data_table, line_chart
Best for: Enterprise learning measurement, ILT program analytics, Course utilization reporting, Learner demographic analysis, L&D ROI measurement
Source: CCE L&D
templates.lms-engagement:
LMS Engagement Dashboard
LMS login and engagement analytics. Colorful KPI badge strip (6 cells: Logins Today/Unique Today, Logins Week/Unique Week, Logins Month/Unique Month) + three-column middle row: Logins by Job table, YOY Login trend line, Last 4 Weeks trend area chart. Bottom: Recent Logins detail table (Employee, Email, Manager, Org, Login Time). Tracks platform adoption and active usage patterns.
Category: learning_development
Focus areas: learner_engagement
Audience: learning_admin
Complexity: medium
Metric profiles: scorecard, trend_heavy
Destinations: embedded, simple
Chart types: colored_kpi_badge, data_table_simple, line_chart_dual_series, area_chart, data_table_detail
Best for: LMS adoption tracking, Platform engagement analytics, Login pattern analysis, User activity monitoring, LMS utilization reporting
Source: CCE L&D
